description: A Friday-afternoon planner who scans the listings page for when and where events happen. Demands that every merit-listing card surface a non-empty .event-when (date + time) on the card header, no expand needed.

asserts.expression: var cards=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.listings .event-card')); if(!cards.length) return false; var bad=cards.filter(function(c){var w=c.querySelector('.event-when'); return !w || w.textContent.trim().length===0;}); window.__logisticsBadCount=bad.length; return bad.length===0;
